description: Get ready to float in comfort with these Receptor floaters from adidas. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals will perform just as well on everyday walks in the park or a stretch of wild terrain on an adventure trek.UpperErgonomically designed synthetic upper, with forefoot and ankle straps with velcro fasteners for easy adjustment to attain a snug FitElasticated piping on the sides of the straps for better flexibilityStitch detailing for re-inforcementPerforations on the sides for better breathabilityLightly cushioned lining for greater comfortHeat transfer logo on the ankle strapAppliqued logo on the back of collarMidsoleCushioned footbed with slightly elevated interlocking triangle design for soft massage feel and all day comfort OutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs on forefoot and heel for durabilityRidge pattern for superior tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetWash careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
